title: Mr. Natwarlal
subTitle: When Natwar's elder brother is framed for bribery, he decides to avenge his brother's humiliation and thus poses as a crime lord.

title: Apartment
subTitle: Preeti, an air hostess, is tired of her unfaithful boyfriend and decides to throw him out of the house. Soon, as she struggles to keep up with the rent, she finds a roommate who appears to be a simple girl but has her own agenda.

title: Kahani Kismat Ki
subTitle: After his release from jail, a criminal tries to make an honest living. However, his plans go awry when a woman claims that he is her husband and later he is arrested for murder.

title: Kahani Kismat Ki
subTitle: After his release from jail, a criminal tries to make an honest living. However, his plans go awry when a woman claims that he is her husband and later he is arrested for murder.

title: Saajan Ki Saheli
subTitle: Kunti abandons her baby in order to lead a lavish life and marries a rich man. Years later, she realises that her husband is indulging in an affair and is shocked to find out the truth about the girl.

title: Khel Khilari Ka
subTitle: Ajit swears revenge after witnessing his family's murder by three thugs. Years later, he becomes a wealthy crime lord, but he still thirsts for revenge.

title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
subTitle: Traumatised by her murder of her husband and the abduction of her two sons, a woman spends her life looking for her family. Things take a turn when two men arrive at her house with a family heirloom.

title: Dil Hi to Hai
subTitle: Twin brothers swap identities in childhood, unknowingly setting the stage for emotional turmoil, romantic confusion, and conflicts tied to their royal lineage.

title: Gangaajal
subTitle: IPS Amit Kumar, an honest police officer, is tasked with curbing Tezpur's rampant crime rates. Here he must work with his fellow corrupt officers and deal with the town's insidious political figures.

title: Shiva Shakti
subTitle: Shiva forms a close friendship with Shakti when he comes to the city to earn money for his sister Kusum's wedding. However, he later vows to kill Shakti when Kusum becomes pregnant with his child.

title: Shiva Shakti
subTitle: Shiva forms a close friendship with Shakti when he comes to the city to earn money for his sister Kusum's wedding. However, he later vows to kill Shakti when Kusum becomes pregnant with his child.

title: Kundan
subTitle: An innocent girl from Jhansi gets a teachers job in a government school in a nearby village called Rudrapur.She relocates to the village but is shocked to find a hostile reception from the village zamindar and his touts. On the day of Raksha Bandhan.

title: Farz
subTitle: Gopal, a secret agent, investigates the death of his colleague who possessed evidence against a known terrorist. Gopal and Kamla embark on a journey to find the traitor.

title: Sikka
subTitle: In order to further strengthen their friendship, two friends marry their kin to each other. But when one of them cannot shake their illegal habits, the wedding is threatened.

title: Pyar Ke Kabil
subTitle: Twin siblings are kept apart from each other after their parents separate. However, years later, the twins reunite and decide to switch roles in order to bring their parents back together.

title: Zakhmi Aurat
subTitle: Determined to exact revenge on the goons who gangraped her, Inspector Kiran Dutt, takes matters into her own hands as the law fails to give her justice.

title: Majaal
subTitle: Vijay Kumar, an orphan, is brought up by an advocate. While he falls in love with his daughter and marries her, he struggles to cope with the humiliation he faces from her family.

title: Khoon Bhari Maang
subTitle: Widowed Aarti falls prey to Sanjay's vicious plan of getting married to him. Later, with the help of her best friend Nandini, he drowns Aarti and seizes her wealth but she survives and seeks revenge.

title: 15th August
subTitle: Nagpal kills Chaudhry and his son, Ram, a military officer. Chaudhry's second son, Vikram, vows to destroy Nagpal who is all set to become the Chief Minister on the upcoming Indian Independence Day.
